behaviors.description: The review input is scoped to the lines that changed, not the full content of each modified file.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: this is a handoff behavior between diff parsing and review-input assembly, not just isolated parsing logic. REAL-INFRA/SYSTEM TRIAD is not explicit in the behavior text, so System is not required. LLM-DEP is not required because this checks input scoping before model quality. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System/Agentic because the behavior text only requires correct local scoping of changed lines, with no real external contract check and no dependence on model output.
behaviors.test_description: Run the real diff-reader + prompt/input-builder modules together on a PR diff fixture containing changed and unchanged regions; assert the produced review payload includes only changed-line hunks and excludes untouched file content.

behaviors.description: Inline comments are attached to the correct positions in the diff view on the pull request.
behaviors.justification: REAL-INFRA + SYSTEM TRIAD applies: correctness is an externally visible side effect on a real PR diff, and must be proven via round-trip observation/readback of posted inline comment positions. Mock API success can hide real position-mapping failures.
behaviors.test_description: Against a real test PR, post inline comments using computed diff positions, then read comments back from GitHub and verify each comment appears at the intended file/line/side in the PR diff view.

behaviors.description: The agent identifies at least one real defect in a pull request that contains a known introduced bug.
behaviors.justification: LLM-DEP: pass/fail depends on real model judgment (finding an actual defect), which stubs cannot validate. REJECTION-GATE: rejected Workflow because behavior text requires a single model-dependent outcome ('identifies at least one real defect') and does not require multiple model decisions across sequential steps.
behaviors.test_description: Run the real model analysis on a known-bug PR/diff corpus and assert at least one returned finding correctly matches the seeded defect category/location with acceptance criteria tolerant to model variability.

behaviors.description: Every finding listed in the top-level summary corresponds to a posted inline comment ID from the same run.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: this is cross-module state consistency (inline-post results -> summary builder). It needs wiring-level validation, not just one function. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System because behavior text does not explicitly require real external contract validation/readback; the key failure is run-local mapping integrity.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the inline-comment posting pipeline with deterministic findings and captured returned comment IDs, then build the summary and assert every summary entry references an ID that was posted in that exact run context.

behaviors.description: No inline finding is dropped from the final summary payload before posting.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: this is end-to-end handoff completeness across pipeline stages (finding set -> inline payload -> summary payload). Unit tests on one transform can miss drop bugs at stage boundaries. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System because behavior text focuses on pre-post payload integrity, not explicit external round-trip visibility.
behaviors.test_description: Run orchestration with a multi-item finding set through inline assembly and summary assembly modules; assert cardinality and identity preservation (no missing finding IDs) in the final summary payload passed to posting.

behaviors.description: The automation sequence (read diff, post inline comments, post summary) succeeds for a real pull request when provided a fixed precomputed finding set.
behaviors.justification: REAL-INFRA + SYSTEM TRIAD: explicit real PR execution and externally visible side effects (inline comments and summary posted) must be verified via real API round-trip. REJECTION-GATE: rejected Agentic because behavior text explicitly fixes findings ('precomputed finding set'), so model output quality is out of scope.
behaviors.test_description: For a real test PR, run the full automation using a fixed finding fixture, then verify through GitHub API/UI readback that all inline comments and the summary comment were created with expected structure and linkage.

behaviors.description: The full live run with model-generated findings (read diff, analyze, post inline comments, post summary) completes correctly for a real pull request without manual intervention.
behaviors.justification: This is a full agent pipeline with model-generated outputs feeding later stages; pass/fail depends on sequential consistency from analyze -> inline posting -> summary posting. MULTI-STEP applies because later steps depend on earlier model-produced findings. REJECTION-GATE: rejected Agentic because the behavior text explicitly requires full pipeline completion across multiple stages, not only single-step model quality.
behaviors.test_description: Run the live end-to-end flow on a real test PR with the production model enabled; verify pipeline completion without intervention, successful posting of inline comments and summary, and cross-step consistency between model findings, posted inline artifacts, and summary references.
